---
title: "People"
lightbox: true
---


```{=html}
<iframe src="people_network.html" width="100%" height="600px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
```


::: {.panel-tabset}

## By Institution

# SUNY Buffalo

[![](img/suny_buffalo.png){width=40% fig-align="left"}](https://publichealth.buffalo.edu/epidemiology-and-environmental-health)

![](img/mugshots/kelly_baker.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Kelly Baker (Principal Investigator)

![](img/mugshots/ellie_madson.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Ellie Madson (Laboratory Manager & Project Coordinator)



# University of Iowa

<!-- [![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/Block-IOWA-Black-TM.png)](https://uiowa.edu/) -->
<!-- [![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/Block IOWA BLACK.png)](https://uiowa.edu/) -->
<!-- [![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/Block IOWA BLACK-TM.png)](https://uiowa.edu/) -->
[![](img/Block IOWA GOLD-CMYK.png){width=40% fig-align="left"}](https://www.public-health.uiowa.edu/biostat/)
<!-- [![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/Block IOWA GOLD-CMYK-TM.png)](https://uiowa.edu/) -->
<!-- [![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/Block IOWA GOLD-ffcd00.png)](https://uiowa.edu/) -->
<!-- [![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/Block IOWA GOLD-ffcd00-TM.png)](https://uiowa.edu/) -->
<!-- [![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/Block IOWA GOLD-ffcd00-TM.png)](https://uiowa.edu/) -->
<!-- [![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/Block-IOWA-GOLD-ffcd00-TM.png)](https://uiowa.edu/) -->



![](img/mugshots/sabin_gaire.png){fig-align="left" width=15%} Sabin Gaire (Graduate Research Assistant)


![](img/mugshots/daniel_kakou.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Daniel Kakou (Graduate Research Assistant)


![](img/mugshots/alexis_kapanka.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Alexis Kapanka (Laboratory Manager)



<!-- ![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/){fig-align="left" width=15%} --> John Kessler (Graduate Research Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/krysan_mark.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Mark Krysan (Graduate Research Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/tan_nguyen.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Tan Nguyen (Graduate Research Assistant)



![](img/mugshots/sriram_pemmaraju.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Sriram Pemmaraju (Co-investigator)

![](img/mugshots/dan_sewell.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Daniel Sewell (Principal Investigator)

![](img/mugshots/luis_torres.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Luis Torres (Graduate Research Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/gabriele_villarini.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Gabriele Villarini (Co-investigator)


# African Population and Health Research Center

[![](img/aphrc_logo2-trimmed.jpg){width=40% fig-align="left"}](https://aphrc.org/)

![](img/mugshots/john_agira.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} John Agira (Laboratory Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/christine_amondi.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Christine Amondi (Laboratory Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/phylis_busienei.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Phylis Busienei (Study Coordinator)

![](img/mugshots/blessing_mberu.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Blessing Mberu (Co-investigator)

![](img/mugshots/bonphace_okoth.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Bonphace Okoth (Laboratory Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/sheillah_simiyu.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Sheillah Simiyu (Co-investigator)

![](img/mugshots/innocent_tumwebaze.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Innocent Tumwebaze (Project Manager)

![](img/mugshots/abdhalah_ziraba.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Abdhalah Ziraba (Co-investigator)


# Maseno University

[![](img/maseno.png){fig-align="left" width=40%}](https://www.maseno.ac.ke/)


![](img/mugshots/jairus_abuom.jpg){fig-align="left width=15%} Jairus Abuom (Laboratory Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/collins_ouma.png){fig-align="left" width=15%} Collins Ouma (Co-investigator)

![](img/mugshots/marsha_sharon.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Marsha Sharon (Laboratory Assistant)


# University of Memphis
[![](img/umemphis.jpg){fig-align="left" width=40%}](https://www.memphis.edu/)


![](img/mugshots/fanta_gutema.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Fanta Gutema (Co-investigator)



# Affiliates

![](img/mugshots/abisola_osinuga.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Abisola Osinuga (Co-investigator, University of North Carolina)


## By domain

# Microbiology and Epidemiology

![](img/micro_epi_icon-from_public_domain.jpg){fig-align="left" width=40%}

![](img/mugshots/jairus_abuom.jpg){fig-align="left width=15%} Jairus Abuom (Laboratory Assistant)


![](img/mugshots/john_agira.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} John Agira (Laboratory Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/christine_amondi.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Christine Amondi (Laboratory Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/kelly_baker.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Kelly Baker (Principal Investigator)

![](img/mugshots/fanta_gutema.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Fanta Gutema (Post-doctoral Fellow)

![](img/mugshots/alexis_kapanka.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Alexis Kapanka (Laboratory Manager)


![](img/mugshots/ellie_madson.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Ellie Madson (Laboratory Manager & Project Coordinator)


![](img/mugshots/bonphace_okoth.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Bonphace Okoth (Laboratory Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/collins_ouma.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Collins Ouma (Co-investigator)

![](img/mugshots/marsha_sharon.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Marsha Sharon (Laboratory Assistant)


![](img/mugshots/abdhalah_ziraba.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Abdhalah Ziraba (Co-investigator)


# Statistics and Computer Science

![](img/stat_cs_icon-from_stable_diffusion.jpg){fig-align="left" width=40%}

![](img/mugshots/sabin_gaire.png){fig-align="left" width=15%} Sabin Gaire (Graduate Research Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/daniel_kakou.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Daniel Kakou (Graduate Research Assistant)


<!-- ![](https://myweb.uiowa.edu/dksewell/pathome/){fig-align="left" width=15%} --> John Kessler (Graduate Research Assistant)


![](img/mugshots/krysan_mark.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Mark Krysan (Graduate Research Assistant)


![](img/mugshots/tan_nguyen.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Tan Nguyen (Graduate Research Assistant)


![](img/mugshots/sriram_pemmaraju.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Sriram Pemmaraju (Co-investigator)

![](img/mugshots/dan_sewell.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Daniel Sewell (Principal Investigator)


# Community and Behavioral Science

![](img/comm_beh_icon-from_public_domain.jpg){fig-align="left" width=40%}

![](img/mugshots/phylis_busienei.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Phylis Busienei (Study Coordinator)

![](img/mugshots/abisola_osinuga.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Abisola Osinuga (Co-investigator)


![](img/mugshots/sheillah_simiyu.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Sheillah Simiyu (Co-investigator)

![](img/mugshots/innocent_tumwebaze.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Innocent Tumwebaze (Project Manager)



# Demography and Urban Policy

![](img/kibera.jpg){fig-align="left" width=40%}

![](img/mugshots/blessing_mberu.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Blessing Mberu (Co-investigator)


# Climate Science

![](img/climate_science_icon-from_public_domain.jpg){fig-align="left" width=40%}

![](img/mugshots/luis_torres.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Luis Torres (Graduate Research Assistant)

![](img/mugshots/gabriele_villarini.jpg){fig-align="left" width=15%} Gabriele Villarini (Co-investigator)



:::
